name: plan_id
description: UUID uniquely identifying this action plan

name: user_id
description: UUID of the user this plan was generated for

name: score_id
description: UUID of the risk score that triggered this plan

name: generated_at
description: When this plan was generated by Gemini

name: risk_level
description: Risk level at the time the plan was generated

name: primary_threat
description: Primary threat the plan addresses: grid, heat, wildfire, flood, none

fields.name: urgency
fields.description: Urgency: NOW, TODAY, BEFORE_EVENT, DURING, AFTER

fields.name: detail
fields.description: Full action description with specific guidance

fields.name: completed
fields.description: Whether the user has marked this action complete

name: gemini_raw_output
description: Raw text output from Gemini Pro before parsing

name: language
description: ISO 639-1 language code the plan was generated in

name: caregiver_notified
description: Whether the caregiver was notified when this plan was created
